info.name: Amdox ERP — Backend
info.description: AMX-ERP-2026 — Auth, Users, Tenants, Finance (Ledger/AP/AR/Currency/Payments), HR (Employees/Departments/Attendance/Leave/Payroll), Supply/ML Forecasting. Run Auth → Login first to capture TOKEN.

exec: if (res.data && res.data.accessToken) { pm.collectionVariables.set('TOKEN', res.data.accessToken); console.log('TOKEN saved'); }

item.name: Generate Forecast (needs inventory + ML service running)
